description: A corporate partner who has a VIP suite for a game wants to pre-order catering.

nodes.task_description: Identify the corporate partner and their suite number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the partner's booking details.

nodes.task_description: Provide the partner with the suite catering menu and take their order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the menu and records the partner's food and beverage selections.

nodes.task_description: Process the payment for the catering order and send the order to the kitchen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the payment and confirms the order with the catering team.
